ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained
Kiwi fruit, flesh without skin, with seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 30 % appelsap, 23,9% appelpulp, 19,5% ananassap, 13,7% perenpulp, 11% kiwipulp, 1,5 % limo - ensap, 0,35 % kleurende levensmiddelen (concentraat van spirulina, saffloer).
